meaning: adj.未被征服(或击败、攻取)的,未克服的
examples: Skill and confidence is an unconquered army.
I will deck you with trophies, garlands of my defeat. It is never in my power to escape unconquered.
I will deck thee with trophies, garlands of my defeat. It is never in my power to escape unconquered.
The exigencies of war with Britain, and survival in an unconquered frontier, gave them little choice.
America is unconquered territory, as are Europe's centres of haute couture, France and Italy.
